note: Focal Point has no global settings page; it is configured on image styles and the field widget, and exposes a manager service. Recipe cases are response-graded (easy); the two execution cases (hard) build image styles with focal-point effects and verify live config state.

evals.prompt: I want to install the Focal Point module on a Drupal 11 site with Composer. Which contrib module does it require to be installed alongside it, and why? Name the module.
evals.expected_output: Focal Point depends on the contrib Crop module (drupal/crop ^2.3); the focal point is stored via the Crop API so it survives image replacement.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I have an image field on the Article content type. How do I let editors set a focal point on it? Name the field widget to select on the form display and where to change it.
evals.expected_output: On Manage form display for the bundle, set the image field's widget to 'Image (Focal Point)' (plugin focal_point_image_widget), which shows a draggable crosshair and an X,Y percentage field.

evals.prompt: I need a fixed 200x200 thumbnail image style that crops around the focal point instead of the center. Which image effect do I add to the image style? Name it.
evals.expected_output: Add the 'Focal Point Scale and Crop' effect (focal_point_scale_and_crop) to the image style; it scales then crops around the saved focal point.

evals.prompt: What are the focal-point image effects that Focal Point ships that I can add to an image style at /admin/config/media/image-styles? I want to crop to an exact width and height around the point. Name the effect machine name.
evals.expected_output: Focal Point Crop (focal_point_crop) crops to an exact width x height around the point; the module also ships focal_point_crop_by_ratio and focal_point_scale_and_crop.

evals.prompt: In code on a Drupal 11 site, I want to load the crop entity that stores the focal point for a given file. What is the crop type machine name that Focal Point uses, and which service loads or creates that crop entity?
evals.expected_output: Use the focal_point.manager service (FocalPointManagerInterface)->getCropEntity($file, 'focal_point'); the crop type machine name is 'focal_point'.

evals.prompt: In PHP on a Drupal 11 site, set a focal point of 50% x / 33% y on a file programmatically and persist it. Which service and methods do I use? Show the code.
evals.expected_output: Get \Drupal::service('focal_point.manager'), call getCropEntity($file, 'focal_point') then saveCropEntity(50.0, 33.0, $width, $height, $crop) to persist the relative x/y percentages on the crop entity.

evals.prompt: If an editor sets a focal point and then re-uploads a different image into the same field, does the focal point survive? Explain how Focal Point stores the point.
evals.expected_output: The point is stored as a relative X,Y percentage via the Crop API (crop entity), decoupled from the file and original dimensions, so it survives image replacement.

evals.prompt: How can an editor check how an image will crop across all the image styles that use a focal point before publishing, from the focal point widget?
evals.expected_output: The widget's Preview link opens a dialog (route focal_point.preview, FocalPointPreviewController) that renders the image through every image style using a focal-point effect.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site, create a new image style with the machine name `eval_focal_crop` that produces a fixed 300 by 300 pixel image cropped around the saved focal point rather than the center. Add the appropriate Focal Point image effect at that size and make sure the image style is saved and active on the live site.

On this Drupal 11 site, create a new image style with the machine name `eval_focal_wide` that crops images to an exact 16:9 widescreen size of 640 by 360 pixels around the focal point. Use the Focal Point crop effect (the one that crops to an exact width and height, not the scale-and-crop one) and save the image style so it is active on the live site.
